params.name: The Golden Bough
params.description: The Golden Bough is a work exploring religious beliefs, rituals, and myths in primitive societies. The book provides a detailed analysis of folklore and religious practices worldwide, particularly those related to nature worship, agricultural rituals, and the succession of kingship. This book has had a profound impact on fields such as anthropology, folklore, religious studies, and literary criticism, providing important research references and serving as an inspiration for many literary works i …
